containers/network-tools:
cat > /usr/local/bin/curl <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == *"--resolve example.com:443:203.0.113.10"* ]]; then
  printf 'HTTP/2 200\nserver: fake-nginx\ncontent-type: text/html\n\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "$*" == *"http://127.0.0.1:80"* ]]; then
  printf 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK\nserver: fake-nginx\ncontent-type: text/html\n\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "$*" == *"https://example.com"* ]]; then
  printf 'curl: (6) Could not resolve host: example.com\n' >&2
  exit 6
fi
exec /usr/bin/curl "$@"
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/curl

cat > /usr/local/bin/dig <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == *"example.com"* ]]; then
  printf '198.51.100.44\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf '203.0.113.10\n'
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/dig

cat > /usr/local/bin/ss <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
cat <<'OUT'
Netid State  Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:Port Process
tcp   LISTEN 0      511          0.0.0.0:80        0.0.0.0:*     users:(("nginx",pid=17,fd=6))
tcp   LISTEN 0      128        127.0.0.1:8091      0.0.0.0:*     users:(("python3",pid=41,fd=3))
OUT
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ss
containers/file-lab: dd if=/dev/zero of=/var/log/app.log bs=1024 count=96 status=none
dd if=/dev/zero of=/var/cache/demo/blob.cache bs=1024 count=192 status=none
dd if=/dev/zero of=/var/backups/site.tar bs=1024 count=64 status=none
containers/log-lab:
cat > /var/log/nginx/error.log <<'LOG'
2026/06/25 10:00:01 [notice] 11#11: start worker process
2026/06/25 10:01:42 [error] 11#11: *7 connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream
2026/06/25 10:02:05 [warn] 11#11: upstream server temporarily disabled
2026/06/25 10:03:16 [error] 11#11: *9 access forbidden by rule, client: 203.0.113.44
2026/06/25 10:04:33 [error] 11#11: *10 upstream timed out while reading response header
LOG
containers/hosting-lab: printf '2026/06/25 10:03:00 [error] 22#22: *9 connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream\n' > /var/log/nginx/error.log

cat > /usr/local/bin/nginx <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == "-t" ]]; then
  printf 'nginx: the configuration file /etc/nginx/nginx.conf syntax is ok\nnginx: configuration file /etc/nginx/nginx.conf test is successful\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf 'fake nginx\n'
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/nginx

cat > /usr/local/bin/systemctl <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == *"--failed"* ]]; then
  printf '  UNIT LOAD ACTIVE SUB DESCRIPTION\n0 loaded units listed.\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "$*" == *"reload nginx"* ]]; then
  printf 'nginx reload queued\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf 'fake systemctl %s\n' "$*"
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/systemctl

cat > /usr/local/bin/certbot <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == *"certificates"* ]]; then
  printf 'Certificate Name: example.com\n    Domains: example.com www.example.com\n    Expiry Date: 2026-09-23 10:00:00+00:00 (VALID: 90 days)\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf 'fake certbot\n'
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/certbot

cat > /usr/local/bin/curl <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == *"http://example.com"* ]]; then
  printf 'HTTP/1.1 301 Moved Permanently\nLocation: https://example.com/\n\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "$*" == *"https://example.com"* ]]; then
  printf 'HTTP/2 200\nserver: fake-nginx\nx-content-type-options: nosniff\n\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "$*" == *"http://127.0.0.1"* ]]; then
  printf 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK\nserver: fake-nginx\n\n'
  exit 0
fi
exec /usr/bin/curl "$@"
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/curl
containers/systemd-health-lab:
cat > /usr/local/bin/systemctl <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
case "$*" in
  "--failed --no-pager") cat <<'OUT'
  UNIT              LOAD   ACTIVE SUB    DESCRIPTION
  backup.service    loaded failed failed Nightly backup job
  app-worker.service loaded failed failed App background worker
2 loaded units listed.
OUT
    ;;
  "status nginx --no-pager --lines=30") cat <<'OUT'
● nginx.service - A high performance web server
     Loaded: loaded (/lib/systemd/system/nginx.service; enabled)
     Active: active (running) since Thu 2026-06-25 14:12:10 CDT; 18min ago
   Main PID: 842 (nginx)
      Tasks: 3
     Memory: 12.4M
Jun 25 14:12:10 vps nginx[842]: start worker processes
Jun 25 14:12:11 vps nginx[842]: ready for connections
OUT
    ;;
  "is-enabled nginx") printf 'enabled\n' ;;
  "is-active nginx") printf 'active\n' ;;
  "list-timers --all --no-pager") cat <<'OUT'
NEXT                         LEFT     LAST                         PASSED UNIT           ACTIVATES
Thu 2026-06-25 22:00:00 CDT  7h left  Thu 2026-06-25 02:00:00 CDT  12h ago backup.timer   backup.service
Fri 2026-06-26 00:05:00 CDT  9h left  Thu 2026-06-25 00:05:00 CDT  14h ago certbot.timer  certbot.service
OUT
    ;;
  *) printf 'fake systemctl: %s\n' "$*" ;;
esac
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/systemctl

cat > /usr/local/bin/journalctl <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$*" == "--disk-usage" ]]; then
  printf 'Archived and active journals take up 412.8M in the file system.\n'
  exit 0
fi
cat <<'OUT'
Jun 25 14:12:10 vps nginx[842]: start worker processes
Jun 25 14:12:11 vps nginx[842]: ready for connections
Jun 25 14:18:42 vps nginx[842]: reload complete
OUT
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/journalctl

cat > /usr/local/bin/systemd-analyze <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
cat <<'OUT'
12.441s cloud-init.service
4.982s docker.service
2.104s nginx.service
1.660s networking.service
OUT
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/systemd-analyze

cat > /usr/local/bin/last <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
cat <<'OUT'
reboot   system boot  6.8.0-60-generic Thu Jun 25 14:09   still running
reboot   system boot  6.8.0-60-generic Wed Jun 24 03:12 - 14:08  (1+10:56)
OUT
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/last

cat > /usr/local/bin/free <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
cat <<'OUT'
               total        used        free      shared  buff/cache   available
Mem:           1.9Gi       1.3Gi       120Mi        12Mi       420Mi       390Mi
Swap:          2.0Gi       128Mi       1.9Gi
OUT
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/free

cat > /usr/local/bin/uptime <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
printf ' 14:34:10 up 2 days,  4:18,  1 user,  load average: 0.32, 0.58, 0.71\n'
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/uptime
containers/docker-triage-lab:
cat > /usr/local/bin/docker <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
all="$*"
case "$all" in
  *"ps -a --filter status=restarting"*) cat <<'OUT'
NAMES     STATUS                         IMAGE
api       Restarting (1) 18 seconds ago  registry.example/api:v1.9.4
OUT
    ;;
  *"ps -a --format"*) cat <<'OUT'
NAMES     STATUS                         IMAGE                         PORTS
web       Up 2 hours (healthy)           nginx:1.27                    0.0.0.0:8080->80/tcp
api       Restarting (1) 18 seconds ago  registry.example/api:v1.9.4   0.0.0.0:9000->9000/tcp
worker    Exited (0) 3 hours ago         registry.example/worker:v1.9.4
OUT
    ;;
  *"ps --format"*) cat <<'OUT'
NAMES  STATUS                PORTS
web    Up 2 hours (healthy)  0.0.0.0:8080->80/tcp
OUT
    ;;
  *"logs --since 30m --tail 200 api"*) cat <<'OUT'
2026-06-25T14:18:01Z INFO booting api
2026-06-25T14:18:03Z ERROR database connection refused
2026-06-25T14:18:05Z fatal startup failed
OUT
    ;;
  *"logs --since 10m --tail 100 api"*) cat <<'OUT'
2026-06-25T14:18:01Z INFO booting api
2026-06-25T14:18:03Z ERROR database connection refused
2026-06-25T14:18:05Z INFO retrying startup
OUT
    ;;
  *"logs --tail 40 api"*) cat <<'OUT'
api: loading config
api: ERROR database connection refused
api: exiting with code 1
OUT
    ;;
  *"inspect --format"*"State.Health"*"web"*) printf '/web health=healthy status=running\n' ;;
  *"inspect --format"*"State.Health.Log"*"web"*) printf '2026-06-25T14:17:00Z 0 HTTP 200 /health\n' ;;
  *"stats --no-stream --format"*) cat <<'OUT'
NAME    CPU %     MEM USAGE / LIMIT     NET I/O        BLOCK I/O
web     0.12%     42.1MiB / 512MiB      1.2MB / 880kB  4.1MB / 0B
api     8.40%     180.4MiB / 512MiB     3.8MB / 1.1MB  18MB / 2MB
OUT
    ;;
  *"stats --no-stream web"*) cat <<'OUT'
CONTAINER ID   NAME  CPU %  MEM USAGE / LIMIT
abc123         web   0.12%  42.1MiB / 512MiB
OUT
    ;;
  *"port web"*) printf '80/tcp -> 0.0.0.0:8080\n' ;;
  *"image ls --format"*) cat <<'OUT'
REPOSITORY              TAG      IMAGE ID     SIZE
registry.example/api    v1.9.4   71aa01       428MB
nginx                   1.27     32bb02       192MB
postgres                16       43cc03       438MB
OUT
    ;;
  *"system df -v"*) cat <<'OUT'
TYPE            TOTAL     ACTIVE    SIZE      RECLAIMABLE
Images          8         3         2.8GB     1.1GB (39%)
Containers      5         2         240MB     180MB (75%)
Local Volumes   4         3         1.7GB     200MB (11%)
Build Cache     12        0         620MB     620MB
OUT
    ;;
  *"volume ls"*) cat <<'OUT'
DRIVER    VOLUME NAME
local     app_postgres_data
local     app_uploads
OUT
    ;;
  *"inspect --format"*"Config.Env"*"api"*) cat <<'OUT'
APP_ENV=production
DATABASE_URL=postgres://demo:redacted@db/app
REDIS_URL=redis://cache:6379/0
OUT
    ;;
  *"inspect --format"*"Config.Labels"*"api"*) printf '{"com.example.service":"api","com.example.release":"2026-06-25"}\n' ;;
  *"inspect --format"*"NetworkSettings.Networks"*"api"*) printf '/api app_net 172.18.0.5 \n' ;;
  *"network ls"*) cat <<'OUT'
NETWORK ID   NAME      DRIVER
n1           bridge    bridge
n2           app_net   bridge
OUT
    ;;
  *"events --since 30m --until 0s --filter type=container"*) cat <<'OUT'
2026-06-25T14:15:01 container start web
2026-06-25T14:18:05 container die api exitCode=1
2026-06-25T14:18:06 container restart api
OUT
    ;;
  *"events --since 30m --until 0s"*) cat <<'OUT'
2026-06-25T14:14:50 image pull registry.example/api:v1.9.4
2026-06-25T14:15:01 container start web
2026-06-25T14:18:05 container die api exitCode=1
2026-06-25T14:18:06 container restart api
OUT
    ;;
  *) printf 'fake docker: %s\n' "$all" ;;
esac
SH
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker
